modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Supported browsers for SDezBuy are unclear.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to access SDezBuy, but I'm not sure which browsers are actually supported. It would be really helpful to know this information so I can use the platform without any issues. Can you provide a list of compatible browsers?
